2604.08540.title: AVGen-Bench: A Task-Driven Benchmark for Multi-Granular Evaluation of Text-to-Audio-Video Generation
2604.08540.paper_summary: Text-to-Audio-Video (T2AV) generation is rapidly becoming a core interface for media creation, yet its evaluation remains fragmented. Existing benchmarks largely assess audio and video in isolation or rely on coarse embedding similarity, failing to capture the fine-grained joint correctness required by realistic prompts. We introduce AVGen-Bench, a task-driven benchmark for T2AV generation featuring high-quality prompts across 11 real-world categories. To support comprehensive assessment, we propose a multi-granular evaluation framework that combines lightweight specialist models with Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), enabling evaluation from perceptual quality to fine-grained semantic controllability. Our evaluation reveals a pronounced gap between strong audio-visual aesthetics and weak semantic reliability, including persistent failures in text rendering, speech coherence, physical reasoning, and a universal breakdown in musical pitch control. Code and benchmark resources are available at http://aka.ms/avgenbench.
2604.08540.paper_summary_zh: 文本到音頻視頻（T2AV）生成正迅速成為媒體創作的核心介面，但其評估仍然分散。現有的基準主要孤立地評估音頻和視頻，或依賴粗略的嵌入相似性，無法捕捉到現實提示所需的細緻聯合正確性。我們介紹了 AVGen-Bench，一個針對 T2AV 生成的任務驅動基準，涵蓋 11 個現實世界類別的高質量提示。為了支持全面評估，我們提出了一個多粒度評估框架，結合了輕量級專家模型和多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs），使評估能夠從感知質量到細緻的語義可控性。我們的評估揭示了強大的視聽美學與薄弱的語義可靠性之間的明顯差距，包括文本渲染、語音連貫性、物理推理的持續失敗，以及音樂音高控制的普遍崩潰。代碼和基準資源可在 http://aka.ms/avgenbench 獲得。
2604.08540.author: Ziwei Zhou et.al.
2604.08540.authors: Ziwei Zhou, Zeyuan Lai, Rui Wang, Yifan Yang, Zhen Xing, Yuqing Yang, Qi Dai, Lili Qiu, Chong Luo
